passed_names: BF1 — Band-range: 'needs to be an evening' → find_next_available + preferred_time=evening
BF2 — Band OR weekday: 'evenings or Saturdays' → ONE call, preferred_time + requested_weekday
BF3 — Single day + band: 'Wednesday evening' → availability + date + preferred_time
BF4 — Recurring weekday no band: 'any Saturdays?' → find_next_available + requested_weekday, NO detail
BF5 — Band-filtered cache used: 'Thursday please.' → agent offers Thu evening slots (no re-fetch, no band question)
